evidence.clean_text: i. legal terms are technical terms, which mean that they are used by experts and not by laypersons in their day life. For example, technical terms such as lawsuit, waiver and abatement are known by lawyers but they are not familiar to the laypers on (Mellinkoff, 1963; Karjo, 2015).
